ReuseCheck.Detail: tasks=89287 (successful=89280), created=89287, ready=89287, closed=89287, checkedOut=357141. No-reuse holds when created>=successfulTasks (one fresh connection per completed Task) and created≈closed (no leak). created<successfulTasks is reuse (suspectedReuseEvents=0); created<totalTasks here is 0 Tasks that failed at server-selection BEFORE opening a connection, not reuse. Per-Task pool check-outs (≈4×tasks) are normal within a Task.
